hero.headline:

hero.description: Airflow, backflow, and ventilation issues — solved in one system. AERIS analyzes your space and engineers the solution.

why.headline:
Problems You Face
Every Day Indoors
why.description: Issues you can no longer ignore — AERIS resolves them at the root.

shat.title: Integrated HVAC System
shat.description: Integrated control for ventilation, dehumidification, purification, and sterilization
specs: Built-in PM2.5 sensor → Real-time air quality & auto control
BMS & app integration → Remote monitoring and scheduling
18 dB quiet operation → No sleep or focus disturbance

drdh.title: Built-in Dehumidifier
drdh.description: Custom built-in dehumidification for optimal indoor humidity.

radm.title: Window/Module Unit
radm.description: Modular and window-mounted solutions — no construction required.

arms.title: Certification & Evidence
arms.description: Verified performance data and certifications for every AERIS claim.

1.title: Free Consultation
1.description: Submit online or by phone. Our team contacts you within 24 business hours.

2.title: On-site Diagnosis
2.description: We visit to precisely measure air quality, humidity, and ventilation.

3.title: Custom Proposal
3.description: We design and propose the optimal solution based on measurement data.

4.title: Installation
4.description: Installation and post-installation inspection after scheduling.

5.title: Ongoing Support
5.description: Regular maintenance, remote monitoring, and emergency A/S.

q1.question: How long does installation take?
q1.answer: Residential: 1–2 days. Commercial: 3–7 days. Exact timelines provided after on-site assessment.

q2.question: Compatible with existing ventilation?
q2.answer: We assess existing systems during on-site diagnosis and choose to integrate or replace. Existing ducts are reused where possible.

q3.question: How loud is the system?
q3.answer: SHAT operates at 18 dB — quieter than a library (30 dB). Night mode runs at even lower output.

q4.question: How does a B2B project proceed?
q4.answer: Consultation → Survey → Proposal → Quote → Contract → Installation → Ongoing Support. A dedicated PM for larger projects.

q5.question: What warranty is provided?
q5.answer: 1-year free A/S standard. Maintenance contracts include remote monitoring and scheduled inspections. Emergency A/S within 48 business hours.

contact.headline: Request a Consultation
